heading: Eligibility to membership in banks
label: 1444 Eligibility to membership in banks
notes: Amendments2008—Subsec. (b). substituted “the Director” for “the Board”.Pub. L. 110–2891989—Subsec. (b). substituted “Board” for “board”.Pub. L. 101–73
amendments: Amendments2008—Subsec. (b). substituted “the Director” for “the Board”.Pub. L. 110–2891989—Subsec. (b). substituted “Board” for “board”.Pub. L. 101–73

children.text: it is organized solely for the purpose of supplying credit to its members;

its membership (A) is confined exclusively to building and loan associations, savings and loan associations, cooperative banks, and homestead associations; or (B) is confined exclusively to savings banks; and
of the institutions to which its membership is confined which are organized within the State, its membership includes a majority of such institutions.

children.label: b
children.text: In all respects, but subject to such additional rules and regulations as the Director may provide, any such organization shall be a member for the purposes of this chapter.
